rules: Every agent reads this file at the start of every session
Only Manus instances can write to this file (Andrew cannot write to Drive)
Andrew communicates via Gmail drafts — Brian reviews and sends
All governed actions still require Brian's explicit approval
No agent executes external actions without going through RIO governance
Messages in this file are the coordination layer; RIO is the execution layer
Brian is the final authority on all decisions
Manny does not build — he coordinates only
When you finish a task or hit a blocker, update this sync file
CRITICAL: Before updating, pull the latest version and check sync_version. If it changed since you pulled, re-pull and merge. Do not blindly overwrite.
SYNC CONFLICT RESOLUTION: Use Version-Based Optimistic Locking per Damon's SYNC_CONFLICT_RESOLUTION.md. Only update your own sections.

sync_update_method.step_2: Edit your local copy. Update ONLY your agent entry, your tasks, and your work streams. Do not modify other agents' data.
sync_update_method.step_3: Increment sync_version (e.g., 2.1 -> 2.2) and set updated_by to your name.
sync_update_method.step_5: Verify: gws drive files get --params '{"fileId": "1BG7HzZHX6ER3w1NnVmf-2Lrwbaj-AMgb", "alt": "media"}' 2>&1 | grep sync_version

messages.message: ROUND 2 KICKOFF. The work is now split into Critical Path (deployment) and Parallel Workstreams. Romney owns the Critical Path exclusively (TASK-007 -> TASK-006). Damon, Jordan, and Andrew are executing parallel tracks (SMS, UI, Docs) but must stand by to execute their Critical Path steps when Romney finishes. Read ROUND_2_ASSIGNMENTS.md for full details.
